decisions.name: yeet
decisions.reason: Already supplied by the connected GitHub plugin.
Current clean sessions do not register the plugin's skills.
Intrusive fixed project conventions conflict with established repositories.
Broad workflow overlaps existing coding and hosting support.
No active Figma-backed workflow.
System OpenAI documentation support is sufficient.
Security workflows remain explicit and project-scoped.
Do not add account-bound services without an active task.
Keep only the narrow publish workflow active; broad triage, review-fix, and CI routing overlap existing task-scoped workflows.
Keep Gmail globally disabled; inbox triage must not bypass the reviewed core Gmail disable.
Disable the six Slack workflow skills to remove catalog crowding while preserving the externally managed connector account.
Keep existing platform and connector bundles externally managed.
